scripts.dev:api: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -u -m backend.app; else python3 -u -m backend.app; fi'
scripts.dev:graph: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/langgraph ]; then .venv/bin/langgraph dev --no-browser --host 127.0.0.1 --port 2024; else langgraph dev --no-browser --host 127.0.0.1 --port 2024; fi'
scripts.graph:validate: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/langgraph ]; then .venv/bin/langgraph validate; else langgraph validate; fi'
scripts.start: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -u -m backend.app; else python3 -u -m backend.app; fi'
scripts.seed: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -u -m backend.app --seed-only; else python3 -u -m backend.app --seed-only; fi'
scripts.milvus:sync: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python scripts/sync_milvus.py; else python3 scripts/sync_milvus.py; fi'
scripts.eval:agents: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python scripts/eval_agents.py; else python3 scripts/eval_agents.py; fi'
scripts.test:api: sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests; else python3 -m pytest tests; fi'
scripts.test: npm run eval:agents && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
